THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 MCALLISTER #29 $440.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $440.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-05-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY $40 BY 5PM 1-12-96, PLTF MAY APPLY EX PARTE TO LIFT STAY. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE APPLIED TO ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
